title: PhotochemicalOzoneCreationCMLFactor
description: PhotochemicalOzoneCreationCMLFactor: Single value indicator for Photochemical Ozone Creation as defined by the CML standard for a particular product or material.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreationCMLPerQuantity measured in [kg C₂H₄ eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
